creator: jumper99@gmx.de
text:
As the daemon sems stable with those patches the memory leak is now the 
bigger problem:

root      70540  0.0 30.5 1102524 635852  ??  S    Thu10PM  48:50.80 
/usr/local/sbin/snmpd -p /var/run/snmpd.pid

1,1GB...
